## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` ┬╖ `npm run lint` ┬╖ `npm test` ┬╖ `npm run build` all pass locally
- [ ] Behavior changes come with a test (or an explanation of why not)
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) тАФ see the DCO section in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] No personal data, credentials, or vendor-specific defaults introduced
